steps.expression: async () => { const active = document.querySelector('button.home-tab-button.active'); if (!(active instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return null; } active.focus(); active.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowRight', bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 0)); const next = document.querySelector('button.home-tab-button.active'); return next instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? (next.textContent?.trim() ?? null) : null; }

async () => { const active = document.querySelector('button.home-tab-button.active'); if (!(active instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return null; } active.focus(); active.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowLeft', bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 0)); const next = document.querySelector('button.home-tab-button.active'); return next instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? (next.textContent?.trim() ?? null) : null; }

() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-provider-card button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Test connection'); return button instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? button.disabled : null; }

() => { const card = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-provider-card')).find((node) => node.textContent?.includes('OpenRouter')); if (!(card instanceof HTMLElement)) { return null; } const button = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Test connection'); return button instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? button.disabled : null; }

async () => { const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!settings.ok) { throw new Error(settings.error.userMessage); } const modelEntry = Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0); const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; const name = `Council Create Modal Member ${Date.now()}`; const saved = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name, systemPrompt: 'Scenario helper for council create modal.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario', 'picker'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!saved.ok) { throw new Error(saved.error.userMessage); } window.__councilCreateModalMemberName = name; return true; }

steps.text: Title, Topic, and at least one Member are required before save.

steps.expression: () => { const input = document.querySelector('#council-view-add-member-search'); if (!(input instanceof HTMLInputElement)) { return false; } const searchText = window.__councilCreateModalMemberName; if (typeof searchText !== 'string') { return false; } const descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value'); descriptor?.set?.call(input, searchText); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return input.value === searchText; }

() => { const row = document.querySelector('[data-add-member-option-id]'); if (!(row instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } const button = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Add'); if (!(button instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return false; } button.click(); return true; }
